derivation: Per-version factory/implementation pairs of the deployed COW Shed generations. Each pair is a deterministic CREATE2 deployment, identical on every supported chain, so the record is keyed by version alone and chain id enters only the EIP-712 signing domain. The eip712_version values are the deployed COWShed.VERSION constants (the domain version string) mirrored by CowShedVersion::version_str. Note: upstream networks.json chain-100 rows were later overwritten by the v2.0.0-generation Gnosis redeploy (factory 0x4f4350bf…, implementation 0x62d3a7ff…, domain version "2.0.0", shipped with the composable-cow work) — that deployment is outside the supported v1.0.x family; the v1.0.1 generation remains deployed on Gnosis at the canonical pair recorded at the pinned tag.
